capabilities.name: Tender requirement extraction
capabilities.notes: Identifies mandatory criteria, weighted questions, buyer outcomes, formatting rules, deadlines, and submission artefacts.

capabilities.name: Evidence mapping
capabilities.notes: Maps bid claims to approved proof points, delivery examples, certifications, policies, and source categories.

capabilities.name: Deterministic scoring
capabilities.notes: Scores opportunity readiness from transparent rules rather than opaque generated judgement.

capabilities.name: Compliance risk checks
capabilities.notes: Flags pass/fail requirements, missing attachments, unsupported declarations, and ambiguous buyer instructions.

capabilities.name: Buyer requirement summaries
capabilities.notes: Turns long tender material into structured buyer requirements, response themes, risks, and next actions.

capabilities.name: Scoped refusal behaviour
capabilities.notes: Refuses to invent evidence, certifications, delivery history, or compliance status where the source library does not support it.

working_style: Treats tender claims as evidence-backed assertions
Separates mandatory compliance from scored quality responses
Prioritises decision-ready summaries over generic bid prose
Keeps deterministic logic visible through source chips and scoring labels
